description: Lightweight profile for plugin validation, docs, Unity template setup and dry-run workflows without GPU generation.

installables.name: Git
installables.role: Clone official repositories and track installed source revisions.
installables.licenseNote: Review Git license and platform installer terms.

commands.linux: Use your distribution package manager to install git.
commands.manual: Download Git from the official source URL.

installables.name: Node.js
installables.role: Run the Codex plugin MCP server and validation scripts.
installables.licenseNote: Review Node.js license and package-manager terms.

commands.linux: Install Node.js LTS from the official NodeSource or distribution packages.
commands.manual: Download Node.js LTS from the official source URL.

installables.name: Python
installables.role: Run validation, post-generation scripts and dry-run pipeline tools.
installables.licenseNote: Review Python license and installer options.

commands.linux: Install Python 3.11 or 3.12 from the official packages for your distribution.
commands.manual: Download Python from the official source URL.

installables.name: OpenAI Codex / ChatGPT Codex
installables.role: Decision layer, plugin host and user-controlled orchestration surface.
installables.licenseNote: Review OpenAI terms, account requirements and product documentation.

commands.manual: Install Codex from the official OpenAI Codex entry point, then set CODEX_HOME if needed.

installables.validation: codex --version and Codex app plugin list

installables.name: Codex Unity ComfyUI Pipeline plugin
installables.role: Asset Factory app, MCP tools, skills, Unity templates and pipeline scripts.
installables.licenseNote: Review this plugin license plus all external tool licenses.

installables.name: PyTorch CPU
installables.role: CPU-only validation runtime for dependency checks and dry-run development.
installables.licenseNote: Review PyTorch license and selected package index terms.

commands.all: python -m pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu

installables.name: DINOv3
installables.role: Manual/licensed model path when a workflow requires it.
installables.licenseNote: Manual download is required. Review Meta/Facebook model terms, Hugging Face access conditions and usage restrictions.
installables.manual: Open the official Hugging Face page, accept terms if required, download the model, then place it in <INSTALL_ROOT>/models/dinov3.
installables.validation: DINOv3 model file exists and checksum is recorded by the user.

installables.name: Unity Hub / Unity Editor
installables.role: Editor runtime for importing generated assets and creating prefabs/scenes.
installables.licenseNote: Review Unity terms, editor license, account requirements and target platform terms.

commands.manual: Install Unity Hub/Editor from the official source URL or point --unity-project to an existing project.

installables.validation: Unity project opens and compiles without AIAssetPipeline errors.

installables.name: Docker
installables.role: Optional isolated setup path for validation and CPU/bootstrap scenarios.
installables.licenseNote: Review Docker Desktop or Docker Engine license for your platform.

commands.manual: Install Docker from the official source URL.
